name: PerSei at Pike & Rose
notes_buildingType: Boutique mid-rise rental community managed by Greystar; central leasing, not individually owned condos.
approxRentRange: ~$2,983 to $3,338/mo for 2BR (as of April to June 2026); 1BR from ~$1,816 to $2,372/mo
notes_units: Offers 1BR, 2BR, and some 1BR+den and 2BR+den configurations. Floor plan codes include 2A, 2B, 2D variants.
bathroomsNote: 2BR units have 2 baths (confirmed: floor plan 2B.1 listed as 2 bed/2 bath, 1,177 sq ft at $3,338/mo).
notes_balcony: Balconies/patios listed as a standard unit feature across plans.
notes_laundry: Washer/dryer included in unit across all floor plans.
notes_elevator: Elevator confirmed. Reviews note a side elevator was broken for an extended period (multiple months) as of 2024 to 2025, with slow resolution. Worth flagging.
notes_pets: Up to 2 pets; 70 lb weight limit per pet; $50/mo pet rent; $250 deposit. Breed restrictions include Pit Bulls, Rottweilers, Dobermans.
notes_pool: Resort-style swimming pool listed as community amenity.
notes_packageRoom: Package receiving confirmed as listed amenity. Reviews note the package room door has been stuck at times with no staff available after hours to assist.
notes_doorman: Greystar and the building's own site both advertise '24/7 Full-Service Concierge,' but resident reviews report no concierge on duty after business hours or on weekends. The '24/7' claim appears to refer to 24-hour maintenance availability, not a staffed front desk around the clock. Treating as 'Likely staffed' (daytime/business hours) rather than 'Confirmed 24h' given the conflicting evidence.
notes_climate: Air conditioning is listed as a unit feature and in-unit HVAC is referenced, but no source explicitly confirms whether residents control their own thermostat independently or whether the building manages heating/cooling schedules.
notes_wellMaintained: The apartments themselves are consistently described as clean and modern (recent renovations, daily common-area cleaning). However, reviews flag an elevator out of service for months, a parking garage with persistent heat and odor issues, a sticky package room door, and poor management communication. The building reads as well-appointed but with some deferred infrastructure issues and uneven responsiveness.
